## Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ Feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code improvement without changing functionality)

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the architectural standards of the project.
- [ ] It meets the acceptance criteria defined by the Project Manager.
- [ ] I have added or updated the necessary documentation.
- [ ] I have tested these changes locally, and they do not break existing functionality (MVP).
